items.name: SFSH-77 "Oophaga" Tactical Stealth Helmet
items.description: Commissioned by the "Social Alignment Bureau". This helmet was originally designed for Internal Affairs within Grunkles military sectors, however during testing the capabilities of the helmet far exceeded its initial role and as such it was later adopted (Or informally by the Internal Military Police- "stolen") By various Corporate Special Forces elements for Stealth Operations. Most notably, Lynx Company.

items.name: Late Antiquity "Baldenheim" Helmet
items.description:
⚠ YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO USE THIS, OR ANY OF OUR ITEMS FOR GAMES

"For me there… will be no pride, no tears… simply the long, low toll of Justitia’s scales falling level once more. Here it ends for you…" - Pavo

The Baldenheim helmet was a type of Spangenhelm that was used in the 6th Century. It could be used by both Romans and Ostrogoths, and likely had usage carrying into the 7th Century.

Created by: Davicolt
Modeled by: Davicolt
Textured by: Davicolt

Support Davicolt's work! He is a very talented 3D modeler and deserves lots of credit.

items.name: Olive OV-2A Helmet (w/o Visor)
items.description:
Since the Mk-22s addition to the BDO arsenal, development of affordable power armor have been in production oversight by the company's Overseer. Adopted after the final trials, this armor has a built in miniature reactor core capable of long lasting power while operating. The suit itself is vacuum sealed to offer protection while operating in space, but also protects against dangerous gasses.
